nasb.text: Likewise, whoever lies down in the house shall wash his clothes, and whoever eats in the house shall wash his clothes.

esv.text: and whoever sleeps in the house shall wash his clothes, and whoever eats in the house shall wash his clothes.

cnv.text: 在房屋裡睡覺的人，要洗淨自己的衣服；在房屋裡吃飯的人，也要洗淨自己的衣服。

ccb.text: 凡在房内睡觉或吃饭的人，都必须洗净衣服。
